title: Hexportation
description: Allows for item/fluid/energy transportation with Hexcasting
body:
Adds multiple patterns for interacting with item/fluid/energy storages via Hex

- Create conduits that connect two inventories
- Transfer items, fluids, energy, and even entities along said conduits
- Gain information about the contents of the connected inv's
- Transfer specific amounts from each slot of the inventories
- Items & Fluids can even be grabbed and dropped from in-world
